body:
**Description**
I am trying to follow the official MoveIt installation tutorial from the website. (For further reference: https://moveit.picknik.ai/main/doc/tutorials/getting_started/getting_started.html ) While running the last command I get an error concerning the architecture of my system which seems to be related to kortex_api.

**Environment**
      -ROS Distro: Jazzy 
      -OS Version: Ubuntu 24.04 (WSL2)
      - CPU information:
      ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1795d795-b7a7-45e2-aae1-582d8f5ff745)

**Steps to reproduce**
After following through the whole tutorial, run the final command:
```
cd ~/ws_moveit
colcon build --mixin release
```

**Error/Output**
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6a9f258c-f6c0-4188-9a8b-8275cd314075)

Is there no aarch64 support yet for kortex_api? If no, how do I install MoveIt on my system?

Thank you in advanace for your help and answers!
title: aarch64 support
